title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 493.045 - Daily newspaper defined
text:
493.045.  Daily newspaper defined. — As used in this chapter the words "daily newspaper" shall mean a newspaper which is published every day, or each day except Sundays and legal holidays, or which shall be published on each of any five days in every week excepting legal holidays and including or excluding Sundays; except, that when a holiday intervenes in any given week the newspaper may be published on each of any four days in said week.
(L. 1951 p. 532 § 493.055)
